title: Cloud Migration for Customer Loyalty Portal
description: Migrate the legacy on-premise customer loyalty portal to AWS. This includes refactoring the database layer to Aurora PostgreSQL and setting up automated CI/CD pipelines.
business_case_summary: By migrating the loyalty portal to the cloud, we expect to reduce infrastructure costs by 25% and scale dynamically during peak holiday seasons, increasing customer satisfaction.
capacity_reasoning: Sufficient backend developer capacity available across the team.
Cloud architect bandwidth confirmed for the migration window.
CI/CD pipeline setup can be parallelised with DB refactoring work.
Medium risk level does not require additional senior oversight buffer.
